calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up On Calendar In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On September 3,2002.
Off Calendar Sep-03-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Cross complainant James Bacsierra appearing with atty. Farley Tolpen. Default prove up as to cross complainant against cross defendants Javier Puentes and Jose Puentes. The court after hearing the oral testimony and reviewing the issues ordered judgment for cross complainant James Bacsierra against cross defendants Javier Puentes and Jose Puentes for $5,000.00 Principal, $2000.00 attorney fees, $123.50 interest and $293.00 cost. D. Carter, Clerk; Leticia Perez, CSR. Tomar Mason, Judge. 608.
